response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and distributed systems, with strong polyglot skills and exposure to high-throughput services at Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core competencies for this IC6 Growth/Experimentation role. Title progression (Senior/Staff) and lack of demonstrated principal-level cross-org platform leadership also fall short of IC6 expectations.
strengths: Polyglot engineer with deep experience in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java
Built high-throughput, low-latency systems at Sociomantic handling millions of req/sec
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring and teaching
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, or feature flagging
Lacks telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical analysis background required for the role
Career level (Senior/Staff) and scope of impact do not clearly match Principal/IC6 cross-org platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Strong distributed systems and polyglot engineering background
Seniority gap vs IC6 Principal expectations
